differentiationOpportunities.title: Create competitor-informed SEO/GEO comparison content

differentiationOpportunities.title: Test a low-friction ENHE validation offer
differentiationOpportunities.description: Because first revenue is not yet proven, use competitor pricing signals to test a low-cost validation offer instead of a large build.
suggestedCodexTasks: Draft a validation price ladder and checkout path checklist.
Define success criteria for first paid intent: click, inquiry, presale, or paid order.
risks: Competitor pricing visibility does not reveal sales volume or revenue.
Competitor evidence does not fabricate competitor sales, traffic, or revenue.
